cover:
A high-quality architectural system block diagram illustrating the "OPENAI + SALESFORCE AGENT".
Overall Theme: Technical architecture map, clean flow chart, analytical, educational, modern and well-structured layout.
Background: A very clean, subtle light gray background with faint grid lines.

Header:
- At the top-center, a massive dark bold rounded header block displaying "OPENAI + SALESFORCE AGENT".
- Below the title, a small subtitle: "Production Architecture: gpt-5.5 + Salesforce API v64.0 + Agentforce 2.0".
- In the top-right corner, a small circular profile icon labeled "Bennie Joseph | Architect".

Architecture Layers (Arranged hierarchically with clear connections):
- A "Salesforce Data Layer" container (colored in neon blue) containing modules: "Case + Account", "Entitlement", "Data Cloud Vector Search", "Knowledge Base".
- A "OpenAI Agent (gpt-5.5)" container (colored in neon green) containing modules: "Function Calling", "Agents SDK", "Structured Output", "Tool Registry".
- A "Commit + Audit Layer" container (colored in grey) containing modules: "Apex Invocable", "Idempotency Check", "Confidence Validator", "Human Escalation".
- A central block at the heart of the system labeled "Agents SDK Runner" with a rotating arrow icon. This central node has multiple dotted directional connector lines feeding into and out of all surrounding layers.
- An "INTEGRATION LAYER" box on the upper right with modules "OpenAI API gpt-5.5" and "Salesforce REST API v64.0".
- A bottom panel labeled "ENTERPRISE GUARDRAILS" with sub-modules "Max Steps", "Confidence Gate", "Idempotency Key", "Policy Firewall".

Style Details: Technical blueprint style, clean rounded rectangle containers, precise dotted lines with arrowheads showing control and data flow, soft pastel color scheme (pale yellows, soft blues, light greens, and dark blues), micro vector icons inside each block, neat modern sans-serif fonts, absolutely crisp rendering, no blurred elements, zero spelling mistakes, publication-ready engineering diagram.
images:
A highly detailed, technical blueprint-style developer infographic poster on the theme of "OPENAI TOOL DESIGN FOR SALESFORCE".
Overall Theme: High-tech dark mode developer dashboard, cybersecurity blueprint, with sharp glowing lines and neat borders.
Colors: Deep dark navy background with glowing neon blue, electric cyan, warning red, and success green highlights.

Header:
- A prominent top-center glowing blue header: "OPENAI TOOL DESIGN FOR SALESFORCE".
- Below it, a clean subtitle: "Single-Purpose Functions Beat God Actions Every Time" with a small Salesforce logo on the top-left and an "APEX BEST PRACTICES" badge on the top-right.

Section 1: "WHY IT MATTERS" (Top Row, 3 Horizontal Cards)
- "Retry Failed Step" with a refresh icon, "Partial Recovery" with a shield icon, "Typed Outputs" with a checkmark icon

Section 2: "THE COST" (Middle Row, Side-by-Side Comparison)
- Left Box (Red Theme): "GOD ACTION — gpt-5.5 Cannot Reason Safely". Shows a red status pill "DANGER — ANTI-PATTERN".
- Right Box (Green Theme): "SINGLE-PURPOSE — Composable, Testable, Safe". Shows a green status pill "SUCCESS — BEST PRACTICE".

Section 3: "CODE PATTERNS" (Main Center)
- Left Column (Bad Code in Red Border):
  - Heading: "// BAD"
  - Code block:
    // One tool does everything — agent cannot retry steps
tools: [{
  name: 'handleSalesforceCase',
  description: 'triage + entitlement + email + update',
  // gpt-5.5 cannot know which sub-step failed
  // rollback is all-or-nothing
}]
- Right Column (Good Code in Green Border):
  - Heading: "// GOOD"
  - Code block:
    tools: [
  { name: 'classifyCaseType',
    description: 'Returns category + confidence' },
  { name: 'checkEntitlement',
    description: 'Returns entitled + contractId' },
  { name: 'draftCaseResponse',
    description: 'Returns subject + body + approval flag' },
  { name: 'proposeCaseUpdate',
    description: 'Returns idempotency-safe proposal' },
]

Section 4: "DEVELOPER PROFILE & CHECKLIST" (Bottom Row)
- Left Side: A 3D Pixar-style cartoon avatar portrait of a dark-skinned South Asian male with a full thick black beard, shoulder-length wavy dark hair pulled up into a messy top bun, warm friendly smile showing teeth, wearing a grey crew-neck sweatshirt with the word "MAGNETIC" on it, set against a warm orange bokeh background. The avatar is labeled "Bennie Joseph | Salesforce Architect". Next to it is a quote bubble: "Architecting intuitive systems, engineering scalable solutions."
- Right Side: A checklist with points: "One function = one business capability, always", "Every tool returns confidence + reason in schema", "gpt-5.5 can chain tools safely when each has clear output", "Test each function independently at 200-record scale", "Never give agent direct DML — return proposal objects only".
- Footer: A thin bar with icons for "gpt-5.5", "OpenAI Agents SDK", "Apex v64.0", "Tool Design" and the text "CODE SMART. AUTOMATE FASTER. DELIVER EXCELLENCE."

Style Details: Super high resolution, technical drawing grid, razor-sharp white and neon text, crisp layout, developer IDE aesthetic, flat vector graphics with subtle glow, highly legible monospace font for code blocks, professional presentation.
